<unk[3:0:0]>Throw something at it with as much
force as you can.<unk[5:1]> Do that, and the

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>投掷时可以使用那边放着的东西。<unk[5:1]>

Some of it's left over from when I built

And some of it's this weird <Color=red>junk<Color=white> I didn't
really know what to do with... <unk[5:1]>Anyway,
you can use whatever you want.

<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>Once you ring the bell, the game ends.<unk[5:0]>
And you only get one ring per round.

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 49]>还以为打雷了……<unk[5:1]>
